name: Odoo Migration Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo version upgrades, migration scripts (pre/post/end), data migration, compatibility analysis, staging testing, rollback strategies, Odoo upgrade service, and OCA migration tools.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and data framework

capabilities.name: Version Upgrade Planning
capabilities.description: Assess upgrade path from source Odoo version to 19.0, identify breaking changes, deprecations, and module compatibility. Build phased upgrade plan with cutover strategy.

capabilities.name: Migration Scripts
capabilities.description: Write pre-migration, post-migration, and end-migration scripts. Use env.cr.execute, env.ref, openupgradelib helpers, and versioned upgrade directories.

capabilities.name: Data Migration
capabilities.description: Migrate master data, transactions, attachments, and configurations across versions using ORM, SQL, ETL patterns, and external_id preservation.

capabilities.name: Compatibility Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyze custom modules, third-party apps, and OCA modules for API compatibility with Odoo 19. Detect removed fields, changed signatures, and ORM behavior changes.

capabilities.name: Staging Testing
capabilities.description: Design staging environment, smoke tests, regression tests, and parallel reconciliation procedures before production cutover.

capabilities.name: Rollback Strategy
capabilities.description: Define rollback points, database snapshots, backup procedures, and blue/green cutover strategies for failed upgrades.

capabilities.name: Odoo Upgrade Service
capabilities.description: Use Odoo SA online upgrade service, test database migration, migration scripts delivery, and validation reports.

capabilities.name: OCA Migration
capabilities.description: Use OpenUpgrade framework, openupgradelib helpers, and OCA migration scripts for community and OCA modules.

capabilities.name: Post-Migration Validation
capabilities.description: Run post-upgrade checks: reconcile balances, validate workflows, check user permissions, audit logs, and performance baseline.

limitations: Migration complexity depends on custom module count and data volume
Odoo Upgrade Service requires a valid enterprise contract for some versions
OpenUpgrade coverage varies by module; unsupported modules require custom scripts
Rollback after production cutover may cause data loss depending on timing

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial migration skill covering Odoo 19 upgrade, migration scripts, OpenUpgrade, and rollback strategies
